short_description: Port 8 on SW-U10 err-disabled by bpdu-guard
description: SW-U10 port 8 (Gi1/0/8) transitioned to err-disable state 14 minutes ago after bpdu-guard received a BPDU on a port configured as portfast. Most likely someone plugged a switch or hub into an access port. Port is admin-up, oper-down. Need to identify the offending device before clearing the err-disable.

cmdb.port_short_description: admin=up oper=up speed=1G duplex=full vlan=10 mode=access stp=forwarding
